Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.event.user

Class UserEvent

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.event.NecrifyEvent
de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.event.user.UserEvent
Direct Known Subclasses:
PunishmentEvent, UserCreatedEvent, UserDeletedEvent, UserLoadedEvent
public abstract class UserEvent extends NecrifyEvent
Represents an event that is related to a user or his actions.
Since:
1.2.0
